title: Red Sand Concrete
description: Allows the use of Red Sand in crafting concrete powder!
body:
## Are you tired of needing concrete powder but only have Red Sand?

Well, look no further than RSC!

This small, lightweight Datapack allows the use of Red Sand in your concrete powder crafting endeavors!

![Both sands usable at the same time!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b450da1a1acae3e0760c66834e2d207c0f3751d.png)

Just throw this into the Datapacks folder of your world and get to crafting!
